name: Quick Chocolate Zucchini Picnic Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Devil's food cake mix (without pudding included)
1 Instant chocolate or fudge pudding & pie filling mix (4 oz size)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a large bowl, beat cake mix, pudding mix, eggs, oil, zucchini, cinnamon, and orange zest with an electric mixer on medium speed for 3 to 4 minutes until fluffy and thoroughly blended.
3. Stir in coconut and walnuts.
4. Turn batter into a greased and floured 9x13-inch baking pan.
5. Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Let cake cool in the pan.
7. Sprinkle powdered sugar over the top before serving.
